name: Abdul Al Jihad
bio: He works in airline ticket monitoring. He is responsible for managing and tracking ticket operations efficiently.

name: Tarek Mahmud
bio: works at a travel agency. He is passionate about his work and always eager to learn more

name: Mahdi Hasan
bio: He is a civil engineer. Among friends, he is the fastest to fall asleep during adda

name: Mainul Shuvo
bio: He works in the banking sector. He is dedicated and a positive thinker

name: Shawon Islam
bio: Best friend since Class 3. We've survived through everything together — school, heartbreaks, and career struggles. Life got busy but she's irreplaceable.

name: Navil Khan
bio: Frontend dev at my current company. We collaborate daily on product design and often grab lunch together. Great guy with an eye for clean UI.

name: jakir Hossain
bio: My thesis partner in final year. We spent six months drowning in research papers together. She moved to Sylhet after graduation and we rarely talk now.

name: Atik Hasan
bio: Grew up on the same street in Mirpur. We've been friends for over 15 years. He's my go-to person whenever I need honest, unfiltered advice.
